page_metadata.biotools__summary: MultiVERSE is a multiplex and multiplex-heterogeneous network embedding approach. Embedding of Monoplex, Multiplex, Heterogeneous, Multiplex-Heterogeneous and full Multiplex-Heterogeneous Networks.
